items.title: S01E01 - Troika
items.summary: The officers of the Special Branch mount a dawn raid on the homes of the members of a suspected spy ring.

infolabels.title: Troika
infolabels.plot: The officers of the Special Branch mount a dawn raid on the homes of the members of a suspected spy ring.

items.title: S01E02 - Smokescreen
items.summary: Cowley suicides shortly after an unproductive round of questioning by Eden in gaol, which leads to an embarrassing public coroner's inquest. Jordon investigates a scientist being vetted for a sensitive position and all agree he's too far left for further consideration, yet he still succeeds.

infolabels.title: Smokescreen
infolabels.plot: Cowley suicides shortly after an unproductive round of questioning by Eden in gaol, which leads to an embarrassing public coroner's inquest. Jordon investigates a scientist being vetted for a sensitive position and all agree he's too far left for further consideration, yet he still succeeds.

items.title: S01E03 - The Promised Land
items.summary: A small boat arrives at a beach in Kent where illegal aliens are unloaded, but the police bag the smugglers and all bar one of the Pakistanis, now quite ill, who seeks refuge with an immigrant rights activist.

infolabels.title: The Promised Land
infolabels.plot: A small boat arrives at a beach in Kent where illegal aliens are unloaded, but the police bag the smugglers and all bar one of the Pakistanis, now quite ill, who seeks refuge with an immigrant rights activist.

items.title: S01E04 - A Date with Leonidas
items.summary: A teenager's vow of vengeance leads to Inspector Jordan interrupting a wedding and Superintendent Eden accepting a parcel that contains death. Before the day is over both men have cause for concern.

infolabels.title: A Date with Leonidas
infolabels.plot: A teenager's vow of vengeance leads to Inspector Jordan interrupting a wedding and Superintendent Eden accepting a parcel that contains death. Before the day is over both men have cause for concern.

items.title: S01E05 - The Kazimiriov Affair
items.summary: Informed that the manuscript of a Russian author's novel which has been smuggled into Britain is a forgery and could discredit the Goverment, Inspector Jordan goes against orders and investigates the claim.

infolabels.title: The Kazimiriov Affair
infolabels.plot: Informed that the manuscript of a Russian author's novel which has been smuggled into Britain is a forgery and could discredit the Goverment, Inspector Jordan goes against orders and investigates the claim.

items.title: S01E06 - A New Face
items.summary: The son of a trusted officer of the special branch has become radicalised while away at university, trying to join a gang of riot-minded militant socialist students. This threatens to break up his family, and his father's position.

infolabels.title: A New Face
infolabels.plot: The son of a trusted officer of the special branch has become radicalised while away at university, trying to join a gang of riot-minded militant socialist students. This threatens to break up his family, and his father's position.

items.title: S01E07 - You Don't Exist
items.summary: A girl lands at Heathrow from Rhodesia, but owing to Britian's break of diplomatic relations, she has no valid passport. A young officer is supposed to mind her until she can be sent back, but takes her for a tour instead.

infolabels.title: You Don't Exist
infolabels.plot: A girl lands at Heathrow from Rhodesia, but owing to Britian's break of diplomatic relations, she has no valid passport. A young officer is supposed to mind her until she can be sent back, but takes her for a tour instead.

items.title: S01E08 - The Children of Delight
items.summary: Is there something sinister going on behind the facade of 'The Children of Delight' - a group of hippies who have arrived on Eden's patch. Detective Sergeants Webb and Gifford go undercover to investigate.

infolabels.title: The Children of Delight
infolabels.plot: Is there something sinister going on behind the facade of 'The Children of Delight' - a group of hippies who have arrived on Eden's patch. Detective Sergeants Webb and Gifford go undercover to investigate.

items.title: S01E09 - Reliable Sources
items.summary: Superintendent Eden is on the spot. The Security Commission has met to consider the leak that tipped a spy during the Troika affair. The detective is cleared - but told that he cannot continue his role as Special Branch controller.

infolabels.title: Reliable Sources
infolabels.plot: Superintendent Eden is on the spot. The Security Commission has met to consider the leak that tipped a spy during the Troika affair. The detective is cleared - but told that he cannot continue his role as Special Branch controller.

items.title: S01E10 - Short Change
items.summary: A girl being held for giving official secret documents to the Russians faces a long gaol term, but an exchange offer for a Briton arrested in Moscow is offered. The officers suspect she's far more than she seems to be.

infolabels.title: Short Change
infolabels.plot: A girl being held for giving official secret documents to the Russians faces a long gaol term, but an exchange offer for a Briton arrested in Moscow is offered. The officers suspect she's far more than she seems to be.

items.title: S01E11 - Exit a Diplomat
items.summary: When a member of a foreign embassy is caught shoplifting in London, but tries to hide her status by willingly accepting arrest, Superintendent Inman takes an interest in her employers.

infolabels.title: Exit a Diplomat
infolabels.plot: When a member of a foreign embassy is caught shoplifting in London, but tries to hide her status by willingly accepting arrest, Superintendent Inman takes an interest in her employers.

items.title: S01E12 - Care of Her Majesty
items.summary: Jordan's methods cause friction in an overseas British Embassy when he goes to investigate the theft of ten thousand pounds.

infolabels.title: Care of Her Majesty
infolabels.plot: Jordan's methods cause friction in an overseas British Embassy when he goes to investigate the theft of ten thousand pounds.

items.title: S01E13 - Visitor from Moscow
items.summary: When a KGB officer is sent to London to coordinate security measures with the SB team for the forthcoming visit a Russian VIP, Inman instructs Jordan to help him - with disastrous results.

infolabels.title: Visitor from Moscow
infolabels.plot: When a KGB officer is sent to London to coordinate security measures with the SB team for the forthcoming visit a Russian VIP, Inman instructs Jordan to help him - with disastrous results.

items.title: S01E14 - Time Bomb
items.summary: Sent to investigate the death of the son of a pro-British oil sheikh in a bomb plot, Superintendent Inman finds a hotbed of intrigue and dangerous international situation about to explode in his face.

infolabels.title: Time Bomb
infolabels.plot: Sent to investigate the death of the son of a pro-British oil sheikh in a bomb plot, Superintendent Inman finds a hotbed of intrigue and dangerous international situation about to explode in his face.

items.title: S02E01 - Inside
items.summary: Jordan goes undercover as a prisoner to uncover a convicted spy's secrets.

infolabels.title: Inside
infolabels.plot: Jordan goes undercover as a prisoner to uncover a convicted spy's secrets.

items.title: S02E02 - Dinner Date
items.summary: Jordan flies to Frankfurt to escort a British subject, Selby, back to England. Selby had disappeared three years earlier in East Germany and the British Government are anxious to learn what he's been up to - but the Russian KGB hide in the shadows.

infolabels.title: Dinner Date
infolabels.plot: Jordan flies to Frankfurt to escort a British subject, Selby, back to England. Selby had disappeared three years earlier in East Germany and the British Government are anxious to learn what he's been up to - but the Russian KGB hide in the shadows.

items.title: S02E03 - Depart in Peace
items.summary: An ex-colonial policeman is pressured to return to Africa to testify at the trial of a onetime Mau-Mau warlord, but he adamantly refuses.

infolabels.title: Depart in Peace
infolabels.plot: An ex-colonial policeman is pressured to return to Africa to testify at the trial of a onetime Mau-Mau warlord, but he adamantly refuses.

items.title: S02E04 - Miss International
items.summary: What appeared to be a straightforward case - protecting the wife of a foreign VIP, who has entered a beauty competition in the cause of female emancipation for her own country - turns into a nightmare situation for DCI Jordan.

infolabels.title: Miss International
infolabels.plot: What appeared to be a straightforward case - protecting the wife of a foreign VIP, who has entered a beauty competition in the cause of female emancipation for her own country - turns into a nightmare situation for DCI Jordan.

items.title: S02E05 - Warrant for a Phoenix
items.summary: An accusation of theft against a highly respected Greek historian sets the Special Branch team a problem. Interpol have requested his extradition from England - but Inman isn't satisfied with the facts of the case.

infolabels.title: Warrant for a Phoenix
infolabels.plot: An accusation of theft against a highly respected Greek historian sets the Special Branch team a problem. Interpol have requested his extradition from England - but Inman isn't satisfied with the facts of the case.

items.title: S02E06 - The Pleasure of Your Company
items.summary: Inman meets the CIA's new man in London. Jordan meets an old friend from Moscow. All perfectly legal - until the two are seen together at intervals and the Special Branch team become involved in international politics.

infolabels.title: The Pleasure of Your Company
infolabels.plot: Inman meets the CIA's new man in London. Jordan meets an old friend from Moscow. All perfectly legal - until the two are seen together at intervals and the Special Branch team become involved in international politics.

items.title: S02E07 - Not to Be Trusted
items.summary: Is an eminent scientist, on lone to a top-secret research establishment, a security risk? That's the question facing Inman and his team. The research establishment is suddenly prone to 'leaks'. Has the man been got at?

infolabels.title: Not to Be Trusted
infolabels.plot: Is an eminent scientist, on lone to a top-secret research establishment, a security risk? That's the question facing Inman and his team. The research establishment is suddenly prone to 'leaks'. Has the man been got at?

items.title: S02E08 - Borderline Case
items.summary: While a member of the SB team keeps watch on Karl Peter's flat, Inman and his team scan though his charge sheet. They believe he will attempt to incite London dockworkers into taking industrial action against their employers.

infolabels.title: Borderline Case
infolabels.plot: While a member of the SB team keeps watch on Karl Peter's flat, Inman and his team scan though his charge sheet. They believe he will attempt to incite London dockworkers into taking industrial action against their employers.

items.title: S02E09 - Love from Doris
items.summary: When military security intercepts letter written to a lonely serviceman by his foreign 'penpal' Rita, which contain casual references to secret information, Supt Inman sends DS Jordan to investigate.

infolabels.title: Love from Doris
infolabels.plot: When military security intercepts letter written to a lonely serviceman by his foreign 'penpal' Rita, which contain casual references to secret information, Supt Inman sends DS Jordan to investigate.

items.title: S02E10 - Sorry Is Just a Word
items.summary: When a Czech au-pair goes missing in London and her father is one of the most powerful men the country, Inman and Jordan must find out what's happened to her. But their enquirers lead to a dead end.

infolabels.title: Sorry Is Just a Word
infolabels.plot: When a Czech au-pair goes missing in London and her father is one of the most powerful men the country, Inman and Jordan must find out what's happened to her. But their enquirers lead to a dead end.

items.title: S02E11 - Error of Judgement
items.summary: When Inman discovers that "The Guardians" are taking a more-than-usual interest in a group of pro-germ-warfare people and finds that their leader is a pretty girl, he decides to send Jordan along to question her.

infolabels.title: Error of Judgement
infolabels.plot: When Inman discovers that "The Guardians" are taking a more-than-usual interest in a group of pro-germ-warfare people and finds that their leader is a pretty girl, he decides to send Jordan along to question her.

items.title: S02E12 - Reported Missing
items.summary: Jordan and Inman go in search of a missing Russian ballerina.

infolabels.title: Reported Missing
infolabels.plot: Jordan and Inman go in search of a missing Russian ballerina.

items.title: S02E13 - Fool's Mate
items.summary: When Britain's top code and cypher breaker is forced to mingle with Communist players during a chess tournament, Inman goes along to keep an eye on him. Moxon, meanwhile, is playing a dangerous game of his own: the pawn being Jordan.

infolabels.title: Fool's Mate
infolabels.plot: When Britain's top code and cypher breaker is forced to mingle with Communist players during a chess tournament, Inman goes along to keep an eye on him. Moxon, meanwhile, is playing a dangerous game of his own: the pawn being Jordan.

items.title: S03E01 - A Copper Called Craven
items.summary: Craven find himself under suspicion of accepting a bribe.

infolabels.title: A Copper Called Craven
infolabels.plot: Craven find himself under suspicion of accepting a bribe.

items.title: S03E02 - Round the Clock
items.summary: Haggerty's appointment to Special Branch immediately brings him into conflict with Craven - he believes that Craven is on the trail of a man who is already dead.

infolabels.title: Round the Clock
infolabels.plot: Haggerty's appointment to Special Branch immediately brings him into conflict with Craven - he believes that Craven is on the trail of a man who is already dead.

items.title: S03E03 - Inquisition
items.summary: Craven finds the tables turned when he is accused of hounding a self-confessed fraud.

infolabels.title: Inquisition
infolabels.plot: Craven finds the tables turned when he is accused of hounding a self-confessed fraud.

items.title: S03E04 - Assault
items.summary: Haggerty and Craven target a team of vicious muggers.

infolabels.title: Assault
infolabels.plot: Haggerty and Craven target a team of vicious muggers.

items.title: S03E05 - Polonaise
items.summary: The Special Branch team are assigned to protect the captain of a Polish passenger and cargo ship who believes he is going to be killed.

infolabels.title: Polonaise
infolabels.plot: The Special Branch team are assigned to protect the captain of a Polish passenger and cargo ship who believes he is going to be killed.

items.title: S03E06 - Red Herring
items.summary: Special Branch joins forces with a bomb-disposal expert to stop a terrorist bombing campaign in the heart of London.

infolabels.title: Red Herring
infolabels.plot: Special Branch joins forces with a bomb-disposal expert to stop a terrorist bombing campaign in the heart of London.

items.title: S03E07 - Death by Drowning
items.summary: The body of a young girl is found floating in the Thames - is it murder, suicide or something worse?

infolabels.title: Death by Drowning
infolabels.plot: The body of a young girl is found floating in the Thames - is it murder, suicide or something worse?

items.title: S03E08 - All the King's Men
items.summary: A deranged man has taken a hostage and threatens to blow up a block of flats. Craven must act quickly to avert disaster.

infolabels.title: All the King's Men
infolabels.plot: A deranged man has taken a hostage and threatens to blow up a block of flats. Craven must act quickly to avert disaster.

items.title: S03E09 - Threat
items.summary: British-born Hollywood star Sue Arden arrives in London to rehearse a play, accompanied by a tip-off from the F.B.I that she could be a target of a murder attempt. Craven, Haggerty and North are assigned to protect the actress, but the job and the murder threats are not all they appear to beâ€¦

Craven, Haggerty and North are assigned to protect the actress, but the job and the murder threats are not all they appear to beâ€¦

items.title: S03E10 - The Other Man
items.summary: Craven finds himself investigating a man accused of being a traitor, but has his doubts as to the truthfulness of the accusations.

infolabels.plot: Craven finds himself investigating a man accused of being a traitor, but has his doubts as to the truthfulness of the accusations.

items.title: S03E11 - You Won't Remember Me
items.summary: Craven is puzzled as to why he has been asked to carry out twenty-four hour surveillance on a couple who are engaged to be married.

infolabels.title: You Won't Remember Me
infolabels.plot: Craven is puzzled as to why he has been asked to carry out twenty-four hour surveillance on a couple who are engaged to be married.

items.title: S03E12 - Hostage
items.summary: Craven and Haggerty are under the gun to find a kidnapped diplomat's daughter before she is killed.

infolabels.plot: Craven and Haggerty are under the gun to find a kidnapped diplomat's daughter before she is killed.

items.summary: The team is assigned to protect a visiting foreign diplomat.

items.title: S04E01 - Double Exposure
items.summary: Craven and Haggerty are assigned to investigate if a photographer is a threat to national security.

infolabels.plot: Craven and Haggerty are assigned to investigate if a photographer is a threat to national security.

items.title: S04E02 - Catherine the Great
items.summary: The team are on the trail of Rehfuss - a deadly assassin who has managed to get into the country.

infolabels.title: Catherine the Great

items.summary: Craven and Haggerty are hot on the trail of a traitor has broken out from prison.

items.summary: An experimental weapon is stolen from a military research facility, but the thieves are unaware the weapon is unstable.

infolabels.title: Stand and Deliver
infolabels.plot: An experimental weapon is stolen from a military research facility, but the thieves are unaware the weapon is unstable.

items.title: S04E05 - Something about a Soldier
items.summary: Tensions run high as Craven and Haggerty investigate two army officers.

infolabels.title: Something about a Soldier

items.title: S04E06 - Rendezvous
items.summary: Craven provides security for the debriefing of a captured KGB agent.

infolabels.plot: Craven provides security for the debriefing of a captured KGB agent.

items.summary: Craven and Haggerty investigate the broadcasting of compromising information about public figures on a pirate radio station.

infolabels.title: Sounds Sinister
infolabels.plot: Craven and Haggerty investigate the broadcasting of compromising information about public figures on a pirate radio station.

items.title: S04E08 - Entente Cordiale
items.summary: Craven is appalled to find himself implicated in his ex-wife's terrorist activities.

infolabels.title: Entente Cordiale
infolabels.plot: Craven is appalled to find himself implicated in his ex-wife's terrorist activities.

items.summary: Craven must unravel the connection between a recently-killed spy and an au pair.

infolabels.title: Date of Birth

items.title: S04E10 - Intercept
items.summary: Craven has to investigate a morally dubious but strategically important foreign VIP who has been robbed of a fortune in diamonds.

infolabels.title: Intercept
infolabels.plot: Craven has to investigate a morally dubious but strategically important foreign VIP who has been robbed of a fortune in diamonds.

items.title: S04E11 - Alien
items.summary: A German student revolutionary has been allowed into Britain under the strict condition that he does nothing political. Craven and Haggerty are made to ensure that he sticks to the terms of his deal.

infolabels.title: Alien

items.summary: Is Strand's erratic behaviour a result of the pressure he is under or is he playing a much more dangerous game?
